description_long: This is a multi-level, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a stepped design, featuring a series of open rectangular compartments of varying sizes. The structure is constructed from light-colored, laminated wood panels with a visible grain pattern, giving it a natural and modern appearance. The shelves are arranged asymmetrically, with the right side rising higher and incorporating more vertical divisions, while the left side is lower and more open. The back and sides are solid panels, providing stability and a clean, finished look. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, and the open design allows for easy access to stored items from the front. This type of shelving unit is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, garages, or public spaces for organizing books, decor, or supplies.
description: A stepped, open wooden shelving unit with multiple rectangular compartments and a light wood finish. The design is modern and functional, with no doors or handles and a solid back panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid back panel and the stepped profile of the shelving unit.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the open compartments and the asymmetrical, stepped arrangement of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, solid wood back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the open shelving structure and the varying shelf heights.
